[Version 1.2 "the cube" update]

  1. sulfur Cube added

  2. Added "Copy This" (crack a sulfur Cube)

  3. Added Sulfur Cave and Sulfur Cave villages (has sulfur cubes)

[Version 1.1 "I forgot to add the bees" update]

  1. self explanatory

  1. almost all mobs from base Minecraft (I can't be half assed to check if I'm right. [Includes the upcoming ones])

  2. SOME dungeons and legends content. Not enough to completely make it "unvanilla"

  3. smut isnt really the BIG part of it. you can still make villager slaver halls yehe

  4. Command Block Wither.

GyattTalk

Hey guys. Did you survive November? Good. Anyways yeah I'm not speaking right now ok enjoy I'm posting the Cthulhu bot next.

The Ai is a bit funky and fucks up the achievement names but here's the gist of it.

The Advancements book keeps track of what the Player has done...aka what the player has bred. It keeps things hidden.

1. That's a start - Fuck a Chicken girl..

2. Barn Owner! - Fuck all the farm Animals atleast once (Cow, Pig, Sheep, Chicken, Donkey, Horse)

3. Is this illegal? - Fuck an Undead Mob

4. Arachnophobia - Fuck a Spider/Cave Spider.

5. you're some kind of...cave Dweller. - Fuck all hostile cave mobs (Spider, Cave Spider, Creeper, Skeleton, Zombie.)

6. The Cutest Predator - Fuck an Axolotl.

7. IT SHOULD HAVE BEEN THE MOOBLOOM! - HATEFUCK a Glow Squid.

8. Sea Life - Fuck any of the following (Drowned, Cod Girl, Salmon Girl, Nautilus, Dolphin, Pufferfish, Zombie Nautilus, Squid.)

9. The NETHER - Fuck all of the nether mobs atleast once.

10. Golden Truce - "Subdue" a Piglin Brute.

11. They love crushing a loaf. - Fuck any Villager, Illager, Or Witch.

12. What is my purpose? - Fuck any golem (must be built by the player.)

13. Doggo! - Fuck a tamed wolf girl, or a wolf but that's risky.

14. Tricky Trials - Fuck a Breeze girl.

15. The W(u)ithering Heights. - Fuck The Wither.

16. Nothing Built Lasts Forever - Build withers until a command block wither appears. And watch it erase itself.

17. Death 100 - Die 100 times.
creator: GYATTMASTER
